backend/main.mo: Defines user profiles, messages, mood categories, session requests, and initializes maps/lists with helper comparison logic and mood template population.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence entries linking feature IDs to affected files, components, tests, and metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Provides prewritten short summaries for numerous frontend files used for build planning.
frontend/index.css: Sets Tailwind base layers and defines light/dark theme CSS variables for background, typography, and UI tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with metadata, social tags, structured data, and root mount for the client app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component wrapping the landing page in ErrorBoundary, Suspense, LocalAuthProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/auth/localAuthCrypto.ts: Implements PBKDF2‑based password verification and AES‑GCM key derivation utilities for local authentication.
frontend/src/auth/localAuthStore.ts: IndexedDB-backed storage layer for local accounts and sessions with CRUD helpers.
frontend/src/components/auth/LocalAuthSc: Username/password auth screen with CAPTCHA handling, mode switching, and form submission tied to local auth hooks.
frontend/src/components/auth/LocalCaptch: Generates a simple math CAPTCHA with regeneration and verification callbacks.
frontend/src/components/experience/Anony: Encrypted anonymous chat interface that decrypts messages, classifies mood, and sends automated reassurance replies.
frontend/src/components/experience/DataE: Form for submitting key/value entries, classifying mood, displaying insights, and showing preset-based templates.
frontend/src/components/experience/Exper: Entry screen letting users choose local auth or Internet Identity, handling transitions and login states.
Styled wrapper providing layout and animated transition for experience views.
Main authenticated experience UI with tabs, logout handling, admin inbox access, and entry gate when unauthenticated.
frontend/src/components/experience/MoodI: Displays a mood insight alert with an icon, gradient title, and reassurance message based on the detected mood category.
frontend/src/components/experience/MoodP: Renders a callout showing reassurance and insight sections styled according to a mood category.
frontend/src/components/experience/Sessi: Provides a form for users to submit a therapy session request with a message and mood category.
frontend/src/components/experience/Thera: Shows a therapist inbox listing session requests with metadata like category, timestamp, and user info.
Modal prompting users to connect with a therapist and optionally submit a session request form.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Footer displaying copyright info and a referral link to caffeine.ai with dynamic hostname tracking.
frontend/src/components/motion/ZoomInVie: Applies zoom‑in animation when content enters the viewport unless reduced‑motion is preferred.
frontend/src/components/motion/ZoomPageT: Handles animated zoom transitions between landing and experience views with reduced‑motion support.
frontend/src/components/motion/ZoomTrans: Animates children with a zoom‑in effect after an optional delay, respecting reduced‑motion settings.
frontend/src/components/navigation/GoBac: A button component that triggers a custom go-back handler or falls back to browser history.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Butto: A styled, variant-based button component with size options and zoom transition effects.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Callo: A decorative callout box with a quote icon for highlighting important text.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Conve: Displays a two-message user/AI preview with optional motion-sensitive animations.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Glass: A glass-style card wrapper with hover and focus scaling transitions.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Progr: A horizontal step indicator showing progress with animated bars.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Secti: A reusable section wrapper supporting headings, descriptions, and layout spacing.
frontend/src/components/sections/CoreEmo: A scroll-animated section presenting a core emotional question and supporting text.
frontend/src/components/sections/Corpora: A burnout-focused informational section with animations and a highlighted callout.
frontend/src/components/sections/FAQSect: An FAQ section using an accordion to display common questions and answers.
frontend/src/components/sections/Feature: A grid of feature cards with icons and staggered animations based on motion preferences.
frontend/src/components/sections/FinalCT: A final call-to-action section with animated background and buttons for starting or organizational info.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: The hero banner with animated gradient, particle overlay, and primary action buttons.
frontend/src/components/sections/HowItWo: Renders a three-step animated overview of how the service works, including interactive step previews and conversation examples.
frontend/src/components/sections/Privacy: Displays key privacy commitments with icons and a trust badge, using scroll-based animation.
frontend/src/components/system/AccessDen: Shows an access-denied message with optional back navigation for restricted areas.
frontend/src/components/system/ErrorBoun: Implements an error boundary that logs context, displays a fallback UI, and reloads the page on retry.
frontend/src/components/visual/NeuralPar: Draws an animated particle network on a canvas unless reduced-motion is preferred.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useExperienceNavigati: Synchronizes experience-view open state with browser history and provides open/close actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context, managing identity loading, login, logout, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalAuth.tsx: React context hook providing local authentication, handling signup/signin, session restore, password verification, and encryption key setup.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating chat messages, encrypted messages, data entries, templates, and session requests via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind-based stylesheet defining color tokens, dark mode, typography, and component utility styles.
frontend/src/lib/classifier/moodBurnoutR: Keyword-based mood and burnout classifier with helpers for rating-based and entry-based classification.
frontend/src/lib/crypto/e2ee.ts: AES-GCM utilities for encrypting/decrypting messages and converting encrypted payloads to/from bytes.
frontend/src/lib/moodInsight.ts: Generates mood insights by selecting reassurance and insight messages from templates or fallbacks.
frontend/src/lib/moodPresets.ts: Defines fallback reassurance and insight templates for mood categories and helpers for selecting them.
frontend/src/lib/motion.ts: Defines shared motion constants and helpers for transitions and zoom animations, including reduced‑motion handling.
frontend/src/lib/security/passwordPolicy: Validates password complexity, checks rotation requirements, and provides requirement text.
frontend/src/lib/useInView.ts: React hook using IntersectionObserver to detect when an element enters view with reduced‑motion support.
frontend/src/lib/usePrefersReducedMotion: Hook that tracks the user's prefers‑reduced‑motion setting via a media query listener.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point creating the React root and wrapping the app with QueryClient and InternetIdentity providers.
Landing page assembling all sections with zoom‑in animations and switching to the experience view using navigation state.
frontend/src/utils/errorBoundaryDiagnost: Provides utilities to capture and log navigation context for debugging ErrorBoundary crashes.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL and session parameters, supporting hash and query routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, animations, shadows, and enabling typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking issues, requirements, and features related to fixing an intermittent navigation crash.
